Returns osmChange XML document

user.notes: Filter by user ID; mutually exclusive with display_name

display_name.notes: Filter by display name; mutually exclusive with user

open.notes: If any value, return only open changesets

closed.notes: If any value, return only closed changesets

notes: Returns up to 100 changesets sorted by created_at DESC

Moderator-only: sets visible=true on comment

osm/node.notes: Must include version attribute matching current version

nodes.notes: Comma-separated list of node IDs; required

notes: Moderator-only; returns 200 OK empty

ways.notes: Comma-separated list of way IDs; required

notes: Moderator-only

osm/relation.notes: <osm><relation changeset='id'><member type='' ref='' role=''/><tag k='' v=''/></relation></osm>

relations.notes: Comma-separated list of relation IDs; required

notes: Moderator-only

bbox.notes: min_lon,min_lat,max_lon,max_lat; required; max area ~0.25 sq degrees

Returns GPX format only; Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=tracks.gpx

users.notes: Comma-separated list of user IDs; required

Returns 200 OK; owner only; soft-deletes via TraceDestroyerJob

lon.notes: Longitude for reverse geocode (alternative to query)

Proxies to Nominatim reverse geocode endpoint
